hero.title_prefix: I build fast, scalable web applications with great user experience
hero.lead: Real-world experience developing complex internal systems, dashboards, CRUDs, API integrations and production-level maintenance.

seo.title: Facundo Herrera — Fullstack Developer
seo.description: Fullstack developer experienced in React, Node.js and MySQL. Building web applications, dashboards and API integrations.
seo.og_description: Web apps, dashboards and fullstack systems built with React and Node.

about.title: Who I am and how I work
about.who_body: I am a Full Stack Developer focused on frontend (React, Vue and Material UI) with over 4 years of experience building web applications, internal systems, CRUDs, dashboards and API integrations.
about.who_body2: At Miii I worked on the development of the internal backoffice and corporate landings, handling deploys and production maintenance. Later, as a freelance developer, I built landings and applications using React, Angular, Tailwind CSS and other technologies.
about.who_body3: I also worked at PBS for Telviso, contributing to the development, maintenance and improvement of internal systems using PHP, MySQL, Vue and JS. I build new features, optimize existing modules, create complete CRUDs, integrate internal APIs, work with Docker containers and maintain systems with high-volume production data. I also participated in incident resolution, performance improvements, legacy code refactoring and the creation of functional interfaces used daily by hundreds of internal users.
about.how_body: I enjoy working as a team, building fast, measuring results and constantly optimizing digital products. I prioritize clear communication, iterative deliveries and clean, maintainable code.

pandapedia.title: PandaPedia
pandapedia.subtitle: Fullstack platform to manage, explore and analyze multimedia content
pandapedia.shortDescription: Fullstack product for managing a multimedia library with exploration, metrics and MySQL persistence.
pandapedia.description: PandaPedia centralizes a personal multimedia content library, combining management, exploration, filters and metrics into a complete product experience. The project integrates frontend, backend, database work and external APIs with an architecture designed to grow.

backendApiDesign.description: Organized endpoints for library operations, authentication, queries and external service communication.

experience.title: Where I applied what I know

bullets: Development and maintenance of internal systems
Creation of CRUDs, forms and dashboards
Complex SQL queries, filters, pagination and optimization
Integration with internal APIs and legacy modules
Design of functional interfaces using Vue and JS
Development of custom landing pages and web applications focused on UX and conversion
External API integration and data flow design
Deployment on Vercel with environment management and performance optimization
Performance improvements (Lighthouse, initial load, efficient rendering)
Technical SEO implementation and search optimization
Scalable frontend architecture with React and TypeScript
Development of the internal backoffice using React and Material UI
Collaboration with internal teams to solve incidents and define improvements
